title: pleurothyrium glabritepalum
intro: Pleurothyrium glabritepalum is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Lauraceae, and is commonly known as "Canelo". This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pleurothyrium glabritepalum include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Pleurothyrium glabritepalum is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction in herbal medicine, with the leaves and bark being used for various medicinal purposes.
